reviews.review_msg: This is my second class with Newton (ASC201 in 2014). As a senior, I believe the class is a failure. Newton's lectures are void of analysis (bynd claiming PRC protects minorities LOL), and what is more troubling, at best inaccurate. Frequent errors, zero citations, errors in test design. No critical thought taught, rather repetition demanded. Stop.

You can tell he really cares about what he's teaching. He has a very calm presence and is genuinely interested by his student's reflections, which is why there's quite a bit of homework. I found the material really interesting and inspiring, and the tests were easy if you read the textbook

Literally the worst class I've taken so far (4th yr student with a 3.4gpa, not amazing but I'm not an idiot). Be prepared to read 100 pages of religious texts/philosophy etc. Weekly quizzes will be extremely specific and based only on readings and not the lecture so you better memorize every little detail of those 100 pages.   Do not recommend
He is awesome! I actually enjoy his class a lot! Just remember to memorize the years of Chinese dynasties and Japanese periods  as well as the details of certain concepts for the exams!! :D

It's an easy class. Just study the vocab list and know the basics of each religion for the midterm and final. The reflection and essay are really good for boosting your marks. You also have to do homework assignments for each tutorial, which can be tedious. The lectures are sometimes boring, but he's a really sweet and passionate prof.
Seems interested in topic but boring lectures. Tests are easy if you study all of the vocabulary words.

Good GPA booster, not the type of course I wanted to take, nor do I necessarily feel like I've learned a lot from the course.  A lot of unnecessary worksheets but worth taking if you need the grade bump. Really nice prof, if you're interested in the humanities it would likely be more appealing.
Michael is amazingI will definitely choose his other courses......

He's an amazing lecturer. I feel like I learned so much from this course. There are quite a bit of writing assignments, but they are short ones and he's quite lenient with his marking. Attendance does matter. The midterm and final were straightforward. Take this course if you're interested.

don't trust people when they say that this class is easy. I am a chinese born student and trust me is it not easy. It is all based on reading and the questions of the mc and its hard. the final was mc and short answer. the short answer were easy but the mc, oh boy i'm pretty sure i guess on 80% of it.
